Customer Review: I had such high hopes for this dress and really wanted it to work for me. i initially ordered the petite small (my usual size) but i found this to be outrageously small. so small in fact that i could not zip it up! i reordered it in petite medium, which was just ok. overall, the top half was comfortable and fit nicely, but the bottom half had a very tight under layer and several somewhat cheap (net) over layers. a major design flaw was the net over layer sewn directly into the zipper
Summary: The customer experienced sizing issues with the dress, finding the petite small too small and the petite medium only somewhat acceptable. They noted design flaws, particularly with the net over layer and zipper.
